thought.text: I will start by planning the tasks for this UI integration stage using the `task_tracker` tool. This will outline the steps I'll take to build and wire the Blog screens.

task_list.title: Analyze UI structure and schema
task_list.notes: Analyze the existing client directory, App.tsx, AppShell.tsx, and the auto-generated rhino.d.ts schema to understand the exact field names and types.

task_list.title: Create Blog pages
task_list.notes: Create the Blogs list page, detail page, and create/edit form page under client/src/pages/.

task_list.title: Configure routing and navigation
task_list.notes: Add the routes for the new pages in client/src/App.tsx and add navigation links in client/src/components/AppShell.tsx.

task_list.title: Verify UI integration
task_list.notes: Verify that the pages load correctly and integrate with the backend API hooks.

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "summary": "Plan the UI integration tasks for the Blog feature", "security_risk": "LOW", "task_list": [{"status": "in_progress", "notes": "Analyze the existing client directory, App.tsx, AppShell.tsx, and the auto-generated rhino.d.ts schema to understand the exact field names and types.", "title": "Analyze UI structure and schema"}, {"title": "Create Blog pages", "notes": "Create the Blogs list page, detail page, and create/edit form page under client/src/pages/.", "status": "todo"}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Configure routing and navigation", "notes": "Add the routes for the new pages in client/src/App.tsx and add navigation links in client/src/components/AppShell.tsx."}, {"notes": "Verify that the pages load correctly and integrate with the backend API hooks.", "title": "Verify UI integration", "status": "todo"}]}

summary: Plan the UI integration tasks for the Blog feature
